title: IAS don't care
description: Disables warning icon for missing encryption on mod In-Game Account Switcher.
body:
![IAS don't care banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ruhz3jCl/images/383f70f22dcbc95f58a0c782e521876d9f5c4941.png)
Tired of that annoying warning? Don't care about your account?
WE GOT YOU!
Just use the resource pack, and let that stupid icon and your worries disappear !

![IAS don't care marketing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ruhz3jCl/images/cd0d3beb08330bad648886e4b30e2bf0d23c0ade.png)
